hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "push\s+--force|push\s+-f|reset\s+--hard|checkout\s+\.|clean\s+-f|branch\s+-D"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED: Dangerous git command detected. Force pushes, hard resets, and destructive operations are not allowed.\"}}" && exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push\s+(origin\s+)?(main|develop)$"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED: Direct push to main/develop is not allowed. Create a feature branch and open a PR instead.\"}}" && exit 0; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^(git\s+checkout|git\s+switch)\s+-b"; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^(git\s+commit|git\s+add|git\s+push)"; then BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "develop" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED: You are on $BRANCH. Create a feature branch first with: git checkout -b WIP/<issue-id>-description\"}}" && exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$"; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then RESULT=$(npx eslint "$FILE" --format compact 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"ESLint issues found in $FILE. Please fix these before continuing:\n$RESULT\"}}" && exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0'
